nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Make a fiery serpent, and set it on a standard; and it shall come about, that everyone who is bitten, when he looks at it, he will live.”

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses, “Make a fiery serpent and set it on a pole, and everyone who is bitten, when he sees it, shall live.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要做一條火蛇，掛在杆上；被咬的，一看這蛇，就必得存活。”

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你去造一条蛇挂在杆子上，凡被咬的一望这蛇，就可活命。”
